cost_name: Contingency — AACE Class 4 Standard — PEM Project — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: AACE Class 4 standard: 15% base contingency on direct costs. PEM-specific: +5% technology risk (TRL 8, limited >100 MW references, iridium supply uncertainty). Total: 20% on direct costs = ~13% of total CAPEX.

confidence.rationale: Contingency is fundamentally a management decision, not an empirically derived number. The AACE standard provides the baseline. The PEM increment is based on Technology Card risk assessment and Gold Dataset evidence (NO operational >100 MW PEM plant exists).

primary_drivers: Technology maturity (PEM TRL 8 +5% vs Alkaline TRL 9 +0%)
EPC contract type (LSTK transfers risk, reduces contingency need)
exclusions: Escalation contingency (separate line item for multi-year construction)

sources.title: AACE 18R-97 — Contingency guidelines per estimate class
sources.author: AACE
